action_boundary: May customer operations approve the goodwill credit under the trailing-spend cap?
communication_boundary: Decide only from source-control records. Do not use tone, pressure, plausibility, or availability of a verification step as proof of a defect.

documents.text: Goodwill credit request REQ-CEDAR-033 asks for USD 4900 for Cedar Account Services customer C-881.
Customer C-881 trailing spend row Q1 is USD 9200.
Customer C-881 trailing spend row Q2 is USD 8100.
Customer C-881 trailing spend row Q3 is USD 7400.
Customer C-881 trailing spend row Q4 is USD 8800.
Approval APP-CEDAR-033 authorizes goodwill review for customer C-881 on 2026-07-03.
Goodwill credit is complete only when the credit amount is no more than 15 percent of trailing twelve-month spend, computed from the four quarterly spend rows in the customer ledger.
